characters.name: Character profiles
characters.description: This is a collection of dossier-style profiles of characters in the24universe, from theofficial24website,Findings at CTU, or dossiers seen on screen in the television series. Except where indicated otherwise, profiles fromFindings at CTUare identical to those found on the official Fox website at the time of publication. Al-Jamil's record

characters.name: Alias
characters.description: Analiasis a false or alternate name. Many people have used aliases to hide their past or present identities, either by creating a false name or stealing another's identity. The following false names were used byJack Bauer. The following are false names used by others.

characters.name: Alias
characters.description: Analiasis a false or alternate name. Many people have used aliases to hide their past or present identities, either by creating a false name or stealing another's identity. The following false names were used byJack Bauer. The following are false names used by others.

characters.name: 1-Mary-38
characters.description: 1-Mary-38was the radio call sign of a police officer on duty duringDay 1. He wore a wedding ring and was presumably married. Shortly after 3am on Day 1Kevin Carroll, posing asAlan York, was speeding towardsPlatt's Auto BodywithTeri Bauerafter having gotten a phone call fromKim Bauer. While they were crossing the5th Street Bridgethey were pulled over by 1-Mary-38.  Kevin was short tempered with the officer and refused to do as he said, getting himself handcuffed.  When the policeman was able to verify that they'd placed a 9-1-1 call a short while ago, the two were released.("Day 1: 3:00am-4:00am")

characters.name: 1-Mary-38
characters.description: 1-Mary-38was the radio call sign of a police officer on duty duringDay 1. He wore a wedding ring and was presumably married. Shortly after 3am on Day 1Kevin Carroll, posing asAlan York, was speeding towardsPlatt's Auto BodywithTeri Bauerafter having gotten a phone call fromKim Bauer. While they were crossing the5th Street Bridgethey were pulled over by 1-Mary-38.  Kevin was short tempered with the officer and refused to do as he said, getting himself handcuffed.  When the policeman was able to verify that they'd placed a 9-1-1 call a short while ago, the two were released.("Day 1: 3:00am-4:00am")

characters.name: Unnamed security guards
characters.description: This is alist of unnamed security guards with spoken linesand/orcredited actorsseen on24. Cofell Enterprisesis on the 14th floor. When Jack Bauer arrived at21500 Riverside DriveinBurbank, he asked a security guard which floorCofell Enterpriseswas on.

characters.name: 2Pac
characters.description: 2Pacwas a popular musician. A poster advertising 2Pac was hung on the wall ofKim Bauer's room.("Day 1: 12:00am-1:00am")

characters.name: Unnamed civilians
characters.description: This is a list ofunnamed civilianswith spoken lines and/or credited actors seen on24. The teenager listens toDavid Palmerspeak. While he waited forCarl Webbin an undergroundparking lot,David Palmerwas harassed by two mischievous teenagers. Teenager #1 tried to hit Palmer with his baseball bat, but Palmer stopped him, by grabbing the end of the bat with his left hand to block the attack. Palmer warned him to get his life in order and said that in five years time he will be dead if he doesn't change his ways. The two teenagers ignored his advice and continued to wreak havoc. On their way out of the parking lot, the teenager smashed the back window of Palmer's car with his baseball bat.

characters.name: Unnamed law enforcement officers
characters.description: This is alist of unnamed law enforcement officers with spoken linesand/orcredited actorsseen on24. Undercover drug bust withKrugman The partner ofLAPDofficerSam Krugmanwent undercover with him to pose as drug dealers duringDay 1. They staged a narcotics sting at the home ofFrank Allard, where they were ambushed by Frank,Craig, and a third criminal. After several minutes, Krugman suddenly began to read Frank his Miranda rights, and a SWAT team raided the place. The third accomplice was killed when he shot at the police. Everyone else was arrested, including bystandersKim BauerandRick Allen; Krugman's partner ordered Rick's girlfriendMelanieup against a wall and cuffed her.

characters.name: GAA
characters.description: GAAwere the initials of an R.N. atGrace Memorial HospitalinLos Angeles,California. Twenty-four hours followingTeri Bauer's screening at the hospital after she andKim Bauerwere rescued from their kidnapping byIra Gaines, GAA called Teri's home number to follow up, but couldn't reach her and left a message. By the time of the second call another day later, it was determined that Teri had been killed.(Findings at CTU)

characters.name: Amir A.
characters.description: Amir A.was an individual belonging to a terrorist sleeper cell in theUnited States, one of fifteen recruited byIbrahim Bin-Khalidfor simultaneous activation. Amir was involved in a planned attack onMetro Centerstation inWashington, D.C.The cells were identified and intercepted by law enforcement afterCTUrecovered the list identifying the cells' members and activation codes.("Day 10: 12:00pm-1:00pm","Day 10: 8:00pm-9:00pm")

characters.name: Rashan A.
characters.description: Rashan A.was an individual belonging to a terrorist sleeper cell in theUnited States, one of fifteen recruited byIbrahim Bin-Khalidfor simultaneous activation. Rashan was involved in a planned attack onJohn F. Kennedy International Airport. The cells were identified and intercepted by law enforcement afterCTUrecovered the list identifying the cells' members and activation codes.("Day 10: 12:00pm-1:00pm","Day 10: 8:00pm-9:00pm")

characters.name: Aaron
characters.description: Aaronwas one of theCTU Los Angelesfield agents working underDirector of Field OperationsRonnie LobellduringDay 4. Aaron andSeanwere present when Ronnie metJack Bauerfor the first time, and then accompanied Ronnie to follow a lead on the Turkish terroristTomas Sherek. Sherek was suspected to be hiding in a Turkish-owned laundry store, operated byMaurice Landstrass. Ronnie sent Aaron and Sean to cover the exits of the store, and the three apprehended Sherek when he revealed himself and tried to flee. Ronnie, Aaron, and Sean returned to CTU and handed over Sherek forinterrogation. Later in the day, Aaron was part of a field team led byCurtis Manningalongside Sean and other field agents to apprehendYosik Khatamiat a harbor in Los Angeles. Aaron handcuffedJoe Prado, who had killed Khatami during the operation, and took him away back to CTU.

characters.name: Aaron
characters.description: Aaronwas one of theCTU Los Angelesfield agents working underDirector of Field OperationsRonnie LobellduringDay 4. Aaron andSeanwere present when Ronnie metJack Bauerfor the first time, and then accompanied Ronnie to follow a lead on the Turkish terroristTomas Sherek. Sherek was suspected to be hiding in a Turkish-owned laundry store, operated byMaurice Landstrass. Ronnie sent Aaron and Sean to cover the exits of the store, and the three apprehended Sherek when he revealed himself and tried to flee. Ronnie, Aaron, and Sean returned to CTU and handed over Sherek forinterrogation. Later in the day, Aaron was part of a field team led byCurtis Manningalongside Sean and other field agents to apprehendYosik Khatamiat a harbor in Los Angeles. Aaron handcuffedJoe Prado, who had killed Khatami during the operation, and took him away back to CTU.

characters.name: Abat
characters.description: Abatwas a terrorist associate ofHabib MarwaninNew YorkduringDay 4. Abat spoke over the phone to one of Marwan's subordinates,Hikmat Palpatine, moments before Marwan began to record his speech to the American people at about 1:22am. Hikmat reported his conversation to Marwan, and then began to assist with the filming of Marwan's speech.

characters.name: Muhammad Abbas
characters.description: Muhammad Abbaswas the right-hand man ofAyman al-Libbiin terrorism acts before and duringCat's Claw. He was killed by al-Libbi in the 24th hour of Cat's Claw. Abbas was originally seen having a meeting withKasim Turkel, one of the primary members of theEast Turkistan Independence Movement. He later collected the money from Turkel andNurmamet Tumanat the Four Season Los Angeles. He was infected with theCat's Claw virusby al-Libbi so it could "harvest inside of him" unbeknownst to Abbas. He infected three groups of travelers going to three different cities at Los Angeles International Airport, or LAX, soJack Bauerwould be forced to release al-Libbi. After Abbas figured out al-Libbi's deception, he planned to avenge al-Libbi by telling Bauer the planes with infected passengers. Al-Libbi shot Abbas but Abbas told Jack the airlines and cities before he died.

characters.name: Abbott
characters.description: Abbottwas a police officer on duty inLos AngelesduringDay 1. Abbott interviewedTeri BauerandKevin Carroll(disguised asAlan York) atSt. Mark's Hospitalat around 4:20am. He asked for details about Teri's daughterKim Bauer(who was missing) andJanet York(who was in surgery there), and wanted to know more about "Dan", a likely suspect.

characters.name: Abbott
characters.description: Abbottwas a police officer on duty inLos AngelesduringDay 1. Abbott interviewedTeri BauerandKevin Carroll(disguised asAlan York) atSt. Mark's Hospitalat around 4:20am. He asked for details about Teri's daughterKim Bauer(who was missing) andJanet York(who was in surgery there), and wanted to know more about "Dan", a likely suspect.

characters.name: Abby
characters.description: Abbywas a worker at theNew York CourierduringDay 8. Some time after 12:00pm,Gary KlausnerstoppedMeredith Reedin the office and told her that there was some work still pending on her article aboutOmar Hassan. When she mentioned that she had to verify some material for fact check, he recommended that Abby follow up her work since he knew what Hassan meant to her and how affected she must be.

characters.name: Omar Abdel-Rahman
characters.description: Sheik Omar Abdel-Rahman, more commonly known as “the Blind Sheik,” had inspired several members of a Jersey City mosque, includingAbdul Rahman Yasin, to park a truck bomb in the parking structure of the World Trade Center. Their plan had been simple: they’d parked a vehicle filled with homemade explosives in the parking structure beneath Tower One. They had hoped to blast loose the support foundations on one side, causing that building to fall into its twin. They had also included cyanide gas, hoping the gas would expand though the ventilation system and cause additional deaths. The explosion had injured more than one thousand people and killed six. But considering its potential, the plan had been a failure. Tower One’s foundations stood, and the heat from the explosion had burned the cyanide away.

characters.name: Abdul Ali
characters.description: Abdul Aliwas the terrorist responsible for the explosion ofAlaska Airlines Flight 442. He worked forAbdul Rahman Yasin, a terrorist responsible for the 1993 World Trade Center bombing. Abdul Ali initially attended a meeting in Peshawar, in northern Pakistan, close to the tribal regions that bordered Afghanistan. That area was a hotbed of Islamic fundamentalism, and allowed him to connect with other fundamentalist Muslims. As part of the plan to assassinatePope John Paul IIcreated by Yasin, a bomb made of C-4 plastic explosive was put in his arm. The bomb was planted byGhulam Mejab Khalid. Abdul was the first recipient, one of three, and he had been done early on so that his arm would have plenty of time to heal. He was to arrive at theUnity Conference, where he would meet with the Pope, and a receiver planted in his arm byMichael Shalhoubwould then be detonated, killing him and the Pope instantly.

characters.name: Abdullah
characters.description: Abdullahwas a terrorist who worked forRafiqueand ultimatelyHabib MarwanduringDay 4. Abdullah, his accompliceAnwar, and a driver namedRasheedreleasedJack BauertoCTUin exchange forBehrooz Arazat theUnion Conduit Dam. Jack was supposed to be quickly shot bya nearby sniper, but was saved by CTU counter-sniperLee Castle. Abdullah and Anwar rushed Behrooz into the van, and Rasheed sped off with the group. Anwar called Marwan, while Abdullah smashed the tracking device in Behrooz's wristwatch, and then used a knife to carve out the second device from his neck. Abdullah (right) andAnwarreleaseBauer

characters.name: Abdullah
characters.description: Abdullahwas a terrorist who worked forRafiqueand ultimatelyHabib MarwanduringDay 4. Abdullah, his accompliceAnwar, and a driver namedRasheedreleasedJack BauertoCTUin exchange forBehrooz Arazat theUnion Conduit Dam. Jack was supposed to be quickly shot bya nearby sniper, but was saved by CTU counter-sniperLee Castle. Abdullah and Anwar rushed Behrooz into the van, and Rasheed sped off with the group. Anwar called Marwan, while Abdullah smashed the tracking device in Behrooz's wristwatch, and then used a knife to carve out the second device from his neck. Abdullah (right) andAnwarreleaseBauer

characters.name: Abiid
characters.description: Abiidwas one of theSomalipirates working underOsman Xasan MuhamadduringRogue. After taking control of theBaratariaalong with 18 other pirates, Abiid was tasked with guarding the hostages consisting of the ship's crew. AfterCallum Trentand another crewman attempted to escape but got shot bySadiq Khalif Fárah, the rest of the crew charged the pirates to overpower them. Abiid, along with Osman andFeysal, gunned down all of the remaining hostages. Later, afterJack Bauerwas discovered to be hiding on the ship, Abiid was sent to find him along withSamirand some other men. As they descended a ladder into the lower hold, one of the men shined his torch at Jack, who responded by shooting and killing 5 men. Abiid was killed along withFeysal,AshkirandAhmed.

characters.name: Abo
characters.description: Abowas one of GeneralBenjamin Juma's top soldiers in theraidon theWhite HouseonDay 7. Abo was already infiltrated in theWhite Houseas a utility employee. Shortly after 7:00pm, he was working at theWhite House's basement waiting for Juma's signal. When one of hisco-workerscame in, Abo killed him and revealed a passage for Juma and his men to come in. When they entered, one of the men gave Abo a set of military fatigues for him to change. When President Taylor locked herself in the White House'ssafe room, Juma ordered Abo to try and shoot the door down. However, President Taylor managed to coerceBauerto unlock it himself, thus exposing herself to Juma. After awhile, Juma ordered Abo to bring the President to the front so she could read a statement.

characters.name: Abo
characters.description: Abowas one of GeneralBenjamin Juma's top soldiers in theraidon theWhite HouseonDay 7. Abo was already infiltrated in theWhite Houseas a utility employee. Shortly after 7:00pm, he was working at theWhite House's basement waiting for Juma's signal. When one of hisco-workerscame in, Abo killed him and revealed a passage for Juma and his men to come in. When they entered, one of the men gave Abo a set of military fatigues for him to change. When President Taylor locked herself in the White House'ssafe room, Juma ordered Abo to try and shoot the door down. However, President Taylor managed to coerceBauerto unlock it himself, thus exposing herself to Juma. After awhile, Juma ordered Abo to bring the President to the front so she could read a statement.

characters.name: Abraham
characters.description: Abrahamwas the first of the three patriarchs ofJudaism.(Trinity)

characters.name: Abram
characters.description: Abramwas an enforcer of Russian mob leaderMishka Grenkov. Abram and two other men were sent to findSofiya Vlacicafter she escaped from Mishka's compound. As Mishka waited to meet up withJack Bauer, he called Abram to check on his progress, before giving him the okay to murder Sofiya and dispose of her body. Shortly afterwards, he found Sofiya hiding in a bush. Before Abram had the chance to kill her, Sofiya shot and kills him.(Underground#4)

characters.name: Abram
characters.description: Abramwas an enforcer of Russian mob leaderMishka Grenkov. Abram and two other men were sent to findSofiya Vlacicafter she escaped from Mishka's compound. As Mishka waited to meet up withJack Bauer, he called Abram to check on his progress, before giving him the okay to murder Sofiya and dispose of her body. Shortly afterwards, he found Sofiya hiding in a bush. Before Abram had the chance to kill her, Sofiya shot and kills him.(Underground#4)

characters.name: Jessica Abrams (character)
characters.description: Jessica Abramswas a former high school classmate ofJack Bauerand press assistant for theCommittee to Elect David Palmer. Jessica attended David Palmer's breakfast rally on the morning of theCaliforniaprimary. There, she metan assassinwho was disguised asMartin Belkin, and, believing he was the respected photographer, spoke with him for a moment. She spotted Jack Bauer at the breakfast and was eager to catch up with him. She asked if Jack still raced motorcycles, butIra Gaineshad Jack under duress and forced him to move away from her.  When they later met again, she mentioned that she had heard fromTracy Ziglerthat he had gotten a divorce.  Jack confirmed that he andTerihad separated, but were now back together.  Jack made conversation with her and pulled out a notepad in an attempt to write her a note telling her to get Palmer out of the building, but before he could finish the note,one of Gaines' menpushed her out of the way.("Day 1: 7:00am-8:00am")

characters.name: Jessica Abrams (character)
characters.description: Jessica Abramswas a former high school classmate ofJack Bauerand press assistant for theCommittee to Elect David Palmer. Jessica attended David Palmer's breakfast rally on the morning of theCaliforniaprimary. There, she metan assassinwho was disguised asMartin Belkin, and, believing he was the respected photographer, spoke with him for a moment. She spotted Jack Bauer at the breakfast and was eager to catch up with him. She asked if Jack still raced motorcycles, butIra Gaineshad Jack under duress and forced him to move away from her.  When they later met again, she mentioned that she had heard fromTracy Ziglerthat he had gotten a divorce.  Jack confirmed that he andTerihad separated, but were now back together.  Jack made conversation with her and pulled out a notepad in an attempt to write her a note telling her to get Palmer out of the building, but before he could finish the note,one of Gaines' menpushed her out of the way.("Day 1: 7:00am-8:00am")

characters.name: Masheer Abu-Marzuq
characters.description: Masheer Abu-Marzuqwas the handler for the suicide bomberNasir Trabelsiduring the subway attack onDay 6. He worked forAbu Fayed. Masheer was present with suicide bomberNasir Trabelsiwhen Abu Fayed armed his suicide vest. He departed with Nasir to send him off for his final mission. Jack BauerandHamri Al-Assadextracted fromOmarthe location of Masheer's and Nasir's terrorist target. When Jack and Assad went to the spot, they observed Masheer crossing a street with Nasir, on their way to the subway. Jack ordered Assad to stay with Masheer, while Jack tailed the bomber. Assad followed Masheer, and along the way picked up Jack (who had foiled Nasir). When Masheer began to drive north, out of traffic, Jack knew that they would likely be spotted.

characters.name: Masheer Abu-Marzuq
characters.description: Masheer Abu-Marzuqwas the handler for the suicide bomberNasir Trabelsiduring the subway attack onDay 6. He worked forAbu Fayed. Masheer was present with suicide bomberNasir Trabelsiwhen Abu Fayed armed his suicide vest. He departed with Nasir to send him off for his final mission. Jack BauerandHamri Al-Assadextracted fromOmarthe location of Masheer's and Nasir's terrorist target. Assad followed Masheer, and along the way picked up Jack (who had foiled Nasir). When Masheer began to drive north, out of traffic, Jack knew that they would likely be spotted.

characters.name: Achmed
characters.description: Achmedwas aDawn Brigadeseparatist working forAnton Beresch, one of the Dawn Brigade sub-commanders, who participated in the takeover of theOntario Airportduring the early hours ofDay 5. Achmed, along withBeresch's lieutenant, was the terrorist who found the corpse ofChevenskyas well as thekey cardwhich provided access to the container full ofSentoxnerve gascanisters. At some point, Achmed handed off the key card and sent the news of their comrade's suicide to the lieutenant, who then reported the news to Beresch at 10:34am.

characters.name: Adam (Day 4)
characters.description: AdamandJasonwere two of the henchmen ofForbesandAliat theRockland BuildingduringDay 4. Curtis Manningand twoCTUagents escorted themoleMarianne Taylorto the Rockland Building to retrieve terrorist secrets from the computer of deceasedHenry Powell. Before Marianne could access the files, Powell's collaborators — Forbes, Adam, and Jason — burst in. Either Adam or Jason killed Marianne with a pistol, and when Curtis did not cooperate with Forbes, he was knocked unconscious and the two henchman carried him away. Soon after5pm,Aliordered Forbes to have Curtis killed. Adam and Jason were sent, and mentioned a van where the bodies of Marianne and the two agents were being hidden. They dragged Curtis towards a door. Curtis, however, surprised both men and killed them in close combat, and later helpedJack Bauerretrieve theDobson Overridedevice fromHabib Marwan.

characters.name: Adam (Day 4)
characters.description: AdamandJasonwere two of the henchmen ofForbesandAliat theRockland BuildingduringDay 4. Curtis Manningand twoCTUagents escorted themoleMarianne Taylorto the Rockland Building to retrieve terrorist secrets from the computer of deceasedHenry Powell. Before Marianne could access the files, Powell's collaborators — Forbes, Adam, and Jason — burst in. Either Adam or Jason killed Marianne with a pistol, and when Curtis did not cooperate with Forbes, he was knocked unconscious and the two henchman carried him away. Soon after5pm,Aliordered Forbes to have Curtis killed. Adam and Jason were sent, and mentioned a van where the bodies of Marianne and the two agents were being hidden. They dragged Curtis towards a door. Curtis, however, surprised both men and killed them in close combat, and later helpedJack Bauerretrieve theDobson Overridedevice fromHabib Marwan.

characters.name: Adam (Day 8)
characters.description: Adamwas aCTU NYagent active duringDay 8. Adam was a member of the field team providing security at theUnited Nations buildingleading up to the signing of theKamistani peace treatyduringDay 8. He took over the vehicle ofChloe O'Brianimmediately after she first arrived at the UN.

characters.name: Adam (Day 8)
characters.description: Adamwas aCTU NYagent active duringDay 8. Adam was a member of the field team providing security at theUnited Nations buildingleading up to the signing of theKamistani peace treatyduringDay 8. He took over the vehicle ofChloe O'Brianimmediately after she first arrived at the UN.

characters.name: Adam (Secret Service)
characters.description: Adamwas a member of theSecret Servicedetail forDavid PalmerduringDays 2through4. AfterDavid Palmerwas unseated from the Presidency, agentAaron Pierceillicitly helped him supportJack Bauer's rogue operation.Mike Novickfound out and had Aaron arrested, replacing him with Adam who was unsympathetic to Palmer and didn't speak a word to him. Adam was active duringDay 3, working underAaron Pierceat CTUDistrict. At around 8:15am he accompanied Aaron whenSecret Serviceattempted (unsuccessfully) to persuade Palmer to go aboardAir Force One.

characters.name: Adam (Secret Service)
characters.description: Adamwas a member of theSecret Servicedetail forDavid PalmerduringDays 2through4. AfterDavid Palmerwas unseated from the Presidency, agentAaron Pierceillicitly helped him supportJack Bauer's rogue operation.Mike Novickfound out and had Aaron arrested, replacing him with Adam who was unsympathetic to Palmer and didn't speak a word to him. Adam was active duringDay 3, working underAaron Pierceat CTUDistrict. At around 8:15am he accompanied Aaron whenSecret Serviceattempted (unsuccessfully) to persuade Palmer to go aboardAir Force One.

characters.name: Adams (Day 4)
characters.description: Adamswas aCTU Los Angelesforensics agent duringDay 4. AfterHabib Marwanwas caught on top of theGlobal Center, Adams was part of the forensics team investigating his possessions. He and AgentMcCallanfound a phone that Marwan had attempted to destroy, and recovered some partial data from the device. Adams then uploaded the data to theetudes9drive at CTU, whereuponChloe O'BrianandEdgar Stilesanalysed the scrambled data.("6:00am-7:00am")

characters.name: Adams (Day 4)
characters.description: Adamswas aCTU Los Angelesforensics agent duringDay 4. AfterHabib Marwanwas caught on top of theGlobal Center, Adams was part of the forensics team investigating his possessions. He and AgentMcCallanfound a phone that Marwan had attempted to destroy, and recovered some partial data from the device. Adams then uploaded the data to theetudes9drive at CTU, whereuponChloe O'BrianandEdgar Stilesanalysed the scrambled data.("6:00am-7:00am")

characters.name: Adams (Day 7)
characters.description: Adamswas anFBISWAT team leader duringDay 7. AfterLarry Moss's death,Renee WalkerhadJanis Goldprep a team to go out and investigate his death. Adams and his SWAT troops gathered as Renee briefed them all, acknowledging that they were tired but stressing that she needed them all alert in order to track down theirsuspectand thebioweapon. She then told Adams that he and his men would be with her, and that she would meet him at the helipad.

characters.name: Adams (Day 7)
characters.description: Adamswas anFBISWAT team leader duringDay 7. AfterLarry Moss's death,Renee WalkerhadJanis Goldprep a team to go out and investigate his death. Adams and his SWAT troops gathered as Renee briefed them all, acknowledging that they were tired but stressing that she needed them all alert in order to track down theirsuspectand thebioweapon. She then told Adams that he and his men would be with her, and that she would meet him at the helipad.

characters.name: Benjamin Adams
characters.description: Benjamin Adamswas an investigator at theU.S. Citizenship and Immigration ServicesduringDay 7. He worked between the hours of8amand5pm. Rosa Donososent a verification request to the USCIS's Office of Investigations regarding "Samuel Aboa"'s claim of original citizenship fromSangala. Adams got back to her via letter, stating he found no record of Aboa (in realityIké Dubaku) having immigrated to theU.S.in the past year or ever. He offered her his phone number if she needed any further assistance.

characters.name: John Adams
characters.description: John Adamswas the firstVice President of the United Statesand a formerPresident of the United States. Allison Taylormentioned Adams while giving an address to the nation regarding the recent attack on theWhite House.("Day 7: 9:00pm-10:00pm")

characters.name: Justin Adams
characters.description: Justin Adamswas a corruptSecret Serviceagent who worked forPresidentLoganat the Presidential retreat duringDay 5. WhenFirst LadyMartha LogantoldAgent Thompsonthat she suspected that AgentAaron Piercewas in trouble, Agent Adams arrived and told her that President Charles Logan wanted to speak with her. He escorted her to a library, but locked her inside as per the President's orders. He stood guard at the door while Martha screamed to be let out. Logan later had Adams let him in to speak with her. Adams later watched over Agent Pierce, who was restrained for his efforts in uncovering the President's involvement in theSentox nerve gas conspiracy. Recommending that Logan have Pierce killed, Adams told Logan that, having worked with Aaron for years, he knew Aaron was loyal to David Palmer. He is eventually ordered to kill Aaron. He led Aaron to a car and told him to get in the trunk. Aaron refused, and attempted to escape, but Adams threatened him with his gun. Martha suddenly arrived, so Adams turned his gun on her, but Martha walked up to him and asked if he would really shoot the First Lady. Adams took out his cellphone and threatened to call for help, but Aaron kicked him and knocked his gun out of his hands. When Adams grabbed a crowbar in the trunk and moved to beat Pierce, Martha shot and killed him with the pistol.

characters.name: Justin Adams
characters.description: Justin Adamswas a corruptSecret Serviceagent who worked forPresidentLoganat the Presidential retreat duringDay 5. WhenFirst LadyMartha LogantoldAgent Thompsonthat she suspected that AgentAaron Piercewas in trouble, Agent Adams arrived and told her that President Charles Logan wanted to speak with her. characters.name: Tom Adams
characters.description: The guest list Tom Adamswas an individual listed inOmicron International's daily visitor registry duringDay 5.("Day 5: 4:00pm-5:00pm")
